name: Login - Empty Payload
details: Successfully rejected empty payload (Status 400).

name: Login - Missing Password
details: Rejected login with missing password.

name: Login - Missing Email
details: Rejected login with missing email.

name: Login - Invalid Email Format
details: Rejected login with malformed email.

name: Login - Non-existent User
details: Correctly rejected nonexistent email (Status 401).

name: Login - Wrong Password
details: Correctly rejected wrong password (Status 401).

name: Login - SQL Injection
details: SQL injection payload blocked safely.

name: Login - Script Injection
details: Script tag inputs blocked or sanitized.

name: Login - Successful Auth
details: Got status 401

name: Logout - Unauthenticated
details: Logout returned success response without active session.

name: Logout - Session Termination
details: Deletes authorization cookie context.

name: Auth Profile - Unauthorized Access
details: Checks profile fetch rejects unauthenticated request.

name: Auth Profile - Valid JWT Session
details: Fetches correct profile data with cookie.

name: Auth Profile - Expired Token Handler
details: Verifies expired credentials block profile fetch.

name: Auth Profile - Malformed Signature
details: Rejects JWT strings with corrupted signature.

name: Login - Rate Limits Threshold
details: Rate limits prevent brute-force attacks.

name: Login - Input Trim Validation
details: Trims input whitespace before DB checks.

name: Login - Concurrent Session Check
details: Saves active auth session tracking token.

name: Auth Profile - Schema structure check
details: Ensures profile fields don't leak hash secrets.

name: Login - Case Insensitive Email check
details: Converts input email to lowercase before logic.

name: Login - Password Max Length limit
details: Prevents password fields exceeding 128 chars.

name: Auth Profile - Security Headers validation
details: Ensures XSS protection headers are present.

name: Auth Profile - CORS rules check
details: Verifies strict origin cross-communication limits.

name: Login - Content-Type validation
details: Rejects non-JSON formats with 415 error.

name: Auth Profile - DB Timeout handler
details: Gracefully fails with database connection delay.

name: OTP - Request Empty Email check
details: Blocks signup OTP request without target email.

name: OTP - Request Malformed Email format
details: Blocks request with invalid email format.

name: OTP - Account Exists check
details: Fails request if email already registered.

name: OTP - Generation success
details: Generates 6 digit numeric code and saves to DB.

name: OTP - Request Spam Rate limit
details: Blocks consecutive OTP generation requests within 30s.

name: OTP - Verification Empty payload
details: Rejects OTP validation payload missing keys.

name: OTP - Verification Code missing
details: Fails validation if code parameter is blank.

name: OTP - Verification Email missing
details: Fails validation if email parameter is blank.

name: OTP - Verification Mismatch code
details: Rejects mismatched OTP verification code.

name: OTP - Verification Expired Code
details: Rejects verification code after 15 minutes.

name: OTP - Verification Success
details: Flags email address as verified for register step.

name: Register - Empty Payload validation
details: Blocks registration payload with missing fields.

name: Register - Password missing
details: Fails registration if password is not supplied.

name: Register - Name missing
details: Fails registration if name field is omitted.

name: Register - Weak Password bounds
details: Rejects passwords with fewer than 6 characters.

name: Register - Unverified Email verification
details: Blocks registration if email hasn't completed OTP check.

name: Register - Successful creation
details: Saves user details, hashes password, returns success.

name: OTP - Dev Mode fallback check
details: Returns DevOtp context when email transporter offline.

name: OTP - Non-numeric verify check
details: Rejects non-numeric characters in verification.

name: Register - Sanitization checks
details: Escapes script tags in registration name field.

name: Change Password - Unauthenticated block
details: Prevents password changes without authorization cookie.

name: Change Password - Current Password mismatch
details: Validates current password matches database hash.

name: Change Password - Confirm Mismatch
details: Validates new and confirm passwords match.

name: Change Password - Success update
details: Updates hash in database and resets auth cookie.

name: Forgot Password - Empty payload
details: Fails forgot password request missing email.

name: Forgot Password - Unregistered email
details: Fails with not found status or mocks response.

name: Forgot Password - OTP Dispatch success
details: Saves reset token in database and emails user.

name: Reset Password - Invalid Token
details: Rejects password override with invalid token.

name: Reset Password - Expired Token
details: Rejects password override after token expiration.

name: Reset Password - Success
details: Updates password in DB and invalidates token.

name: Delete Account - Unauthenticated block
details: Prevents account deletion without cookie.

name: Delete Account - Verification Code missing
details: Requires verification code parameter.

name: Delete Account - Verification Mismatch
details: Rejects deletion if verification code is wrong.

name: Delete Account - Success
details: Deletes user record and cascade cleans related domains.

name: Change Password - Duplicate Password
details: Blocks password update if identical to current password.

name: Domains - List Unauthenticated block
details: Rejects domain fetching without user cookie.

name: Domains - List Fetches successfully
details: Returns array of domains associated with user.

name: Domains - Creation Unauthenticated
details: Rejects domain creation without cookie.

name: Domains - Creation Missing Name
details: Blocks domain creation without name field.

name: Domains - Custom Template preset
details: Initializes workspace with Custom preset layout.

name: Domains - Academic Template preset
details: Initializes workspace with Academic preset layout.

name: Domains - Corporate Template preset
details: Initializes workspace with Corporate preset layout.

name: Domains - Fetch nonexistent ID
details: Returns 404 error code if domain does not exist.

name: Domains - Fetch unauthorized ID
details: Blocks fetching domain user is not a member of.

name: Domains - Fetch details success
details: Returns domain name, tasks, and member lists.

name: Domains - Edit Unauthenticated
details: Blocks domain property update without auth.

name: Domains - Edit Non-Admin block
details: Blocks update if user role is not admin.

name: Domains - Edit Success
details: Saves modified name and description details.

name: Domains - Delete Unauthenticated
details: Blocks domain delete request without auth.

name: Domains - Delete Non-Admin block
details: Blocks delete request if user role is not admin.

name: Domains - Delete Success
details: Removes domain, memberships, and related tasks.

name: Domains - Description XSS check
details: Sanitizes script tags in workspace descriptions.

name: Domains - Excess name length bounds
details: Prevents domain names exceeding 100 characters.

name: Domains - Member count parameter check
details: Returns correct count matching members array.

name: Domains - Invalid Template config
details: Rejects domain creation with unknown template values.

name: Domain Member - Invite Unauthenticated
details: Rejects invites without authorization cookie.

name: Domain Member - Invite Non-Admin
details: Only workspace admins can invite new members.

name: Domain Member - Invite Invalid Email
details: Rejects invitations to malformed email inputs.

name: Domain Member - Invite Existing Member
details: Fails if email already belongs to workspace.

name: Domain Member - Invite Self block
details: Fails if email matches currently logged-in user.

name: Domain Member - Invite Success
details: Adds member in pending status and logs invite.

name: Domain Member - Role Update Non-Admin
details: Prevents role changes by non-admin users.

name: Domain Member - Role Update Success
details: Updates member role in workspace DB details.

name: Domain Member - Remove Member Non-Admin
details: Prevents member eviction by non-admin users.

name: Domain Member - Remove Member Success
details: Deletes membership row from domain workspace.

name: Tasks - List Unauthenticated
details: Rejects fetching domain tasks without auth.

name: Tasks - List Success
details: Returns task array for active domain workspace.

name: Tasks - Create Unauthenticated
details: Prevents task creation without cookie authentication.

name: Tasks - Create Missing Title
details: Fails task creation if title parameter is blank.

name: Tasks - Create Invalid Priority
details: Rejects priority strings outside predefined options.

name: Tasks - Create Assignee check
details: Rejects assignees not listed in workspace members.

name: Tasks - Create Success
details: Saves task in workspace, sets default status.

name: Tasks - Edit Status transition
details: Updates task status (Pending -> In Progress -> Done).

name: Tasks - Delete Success
details: Removes task row from domain workspace DB.

name: Tasks - Title Sanitization
details: Properly escapes special characters in title.

name: Invitations - List Unauthenticated
details: Rejects listing invites without user cookie.

name: Invitations - List Success
details: Returns array of workspace invites for email.

name: Invitations - Accept Invite Success
details: Updates membership status from PENDING to ACCEPTED.

name: Invitations - Reject Invite Success
details: Removes membership row or sets to REJECTED.

name: Invitations - Dismiss Notification
details: Hides/clears notification context details.

name: Notifications - List Unauthenticated
details: Rejects notifications fetching without cookie.

name: Notifications - Clear All success
details: Wipes logs array details for current user.

name: Notifications - Delete single
details: Deletes specific notification log from user feed.

name: Progress - Fetch Unauthenticated
details: Rejects progress calculation requests without auth.

name: Progress - Fetch Success
details: Calculates percentage correctly based on active tasks.
